posts.title: Your First Steps Into AI: Understanding RAG, Agentic AI, and How It All Fits Together
posts.excerpt: A friendly, beginner-style introduction to the modern AI universe, including RAG, Generative AI, and Agentic AI. Learn how these technologies work together to build intelligent systems.

posts.title: Why I Built This Portfolio
